name: Growth Stock Screener
description: Daily (7 AM ET, Mon-Fri): Screens for growth candidates with revenue growth >15%, earnings growth >0, gross margin >40%, market cap >$1B. Stores in watchlist and Neo4j.

parameters.content:
## Growth Screener

Required: postgresApi, neo4j
Criteria: rev growth >15%, earnings >0, margin >40%, cap >$1B

parameters.query: SELECT t.ticker,t.company_name,t.sector,t.industry,t.market_cap,f.revenue_growth,f.earnings_growth,f.gross_margin,f.operating_margin,f.pe_ratio,f.roe,f.free_cash_flow,f.revenue FROM tickers t JOIN fundamentals f ON t.ticker=f.ticker WHERE t.is_active=true AND f.revenue_growth>0.15 AND f.earnings_growth>0 AND f.gross_margin>0.40 AND t.market_cap>1000000000 AND f.period_date=(SELECT MAX(period_date) FROM fundamentals WHERE ticker=t.ticker AND period_type='annual') ORDER BY f.revenue_growth DESC LIMIT 50

INSERT INTO watchlists (strategy,ticker,score,status,metadata) VALUES ('growth','{{$json.ticker}}',{{$json.revenue_growth}}*10,'active','{"rev_growth":{{$json.revenue_growth}},"sector":"{{$json.sector}}"}') ON CONFLICT (strategy,ticker) DO UPDATE SET score=EXCLUDED.score,metadata=EXCLUDED.metadata,status='active';
